title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search discusses 20+ recent AI tools and models including OmniShotCut, Happy Horse, Mocap Anything v2, SenseNova U1, Talkie, Grok 4.3, and Vista 4D. The video covers applications ranging from animation and video editing to multimodal agents and robotics.
